ev-me-note.name: Medical examiner's field note
ev-me-note.description: A page torn from the ME's pad, handed to you at the door.
notes: Lividity fixed in a pattern inconsistent with how the body is posed in the booth.
Core/tissue readings flagged: post-mortem interval inconsistent with the apparent scene.
Plain words: the scene says she died here, last night. The body isn't so sure.

ev-waveform.name: The “new” release vs. an archival master
ev-waveform.summary: Two recordings of the same voice.
ev-waveform.description: Junie's words won't leave you: nobody breathes that evenly. Put the brand-new release up against a recording from last year and look for yourself.

ev-insulin-pen.name: Della's insulin pen
ev-insulin-pen.description: A smart insulin pen from the booth desk.
notes: Dose log shows a normal mealtime dose — but the kitchen is untouched and a food delivery sat uncollected at her door.
Insulin for a meal she never reached: the makings of a slow, accidental low — not an overdose.

ev-contract.name: Aldercrest contract
ev-contract.description: Della's deal with Aldercrest Publishing, read so often the tab is worn soft.
notes: Deliver every title while alive → the synthetic-voice rights and a retirement clause stay with Della's estate (her written wish: my voice dies when I do).
Die before delivery is accepted → the rights revert to Aldercrest in perpetuity. Someone could make her read forever.

ev-harddrives.name: The master drives
ev-harddrives.description: The wall of labeled master drives from the control room.
notes: Decades of Della's recorded masters, meticulously kept.
A folder — 'DELLA — NEW' — carries timestamps from this week, long after she supposedly stopped working.
Whatever 'new Della' is, it is being made here.
